name: Waimanalo Beach
tagline: The longest white sand beach on Oahu — nearly 4 miles backed by the Ko'olau mountains.
parking: Free lot at Waimanalo Beach Park
bestTime: Morning for calm water; any day — rarely crowded
talkStory: Waimanalo means 'potable water' in Hawaiian, and this nearly four-mile stretch of white sand backed by the Ko'olau cliffs is regularly voted Hawaii's best beach. It was a filming location for Magnum P.I., Hawaii Five-0, and several movies. The shore break here produces perfect small barrels for bodyboarding on east swells. Waimanalo is a proud local Hawaiian community — show respect, don't leave valuables in your car, and grab a plate lunch at Keneke's or poi from the roadside stands on the way out.
